title: Dev v0.5.14 Shared Token Submit Fix
notes:
Changes:
- Submit to Master now checks multiple saved token fields:
  githubToken
  token
  sharedGithubToken
  sharedToken
  githubSharedToken
  sharedDevGithubToken
  sharedDevToken
  github_token
  githubPersonalAccessToken
- Saves the token back under multiple compatible names.
- Keeps the full submission payload fix from v0.5.13.
- Keeps remote GitHub verification.
- Renames leftover Feedback Removed text to Submit Update to Master where found.
